title: Odontotos Rail-Biking
description: A unique rail-biking experience on the historic Odontotos railway tracks. A guided tour through the beautiful Vouraikos Gorge.

title: Vouraikos Gorge Hiking Festival
description: Join the annual hiking festival and explore the stunning Vouraikos Gorge with fellow nature lovers.

title: Diakopto Beach Party
description: The biggest beach party of the summer with live music, DJs, and fireworks at Diakopto beach.
